# @zakkster/lite-headless / clipboard

Copy-to-clipboard with transient feedback. Owns the `copied` flag (auto-resets
after `timeout`) and an `error` flag. The write is injectable, so it is fully
testable and supports an execCommand fallback.

## Quick example

```js
import { createClipboard } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/clipboard";

const c = createClipboard({
    value: "npm i @zakkster/lite-headless",
    timeout: 2000,     // ms the "copied" state stays on (0 = until reset())
});
c.attachTrigger(buttonEl);    // click copies + flips data-copied
c.attachIndicator(checkEl);   // shows while data-copied

await c.copy();        // programmatic; resolves true on success
c.setValue("new text");
```

Inject a custom writer (fallback / tests):
```js
createClipboard({ value: "x", write: async (text) => myFallback(text) });
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `""` | Text to copy |
| `timeout` | `2000` | ms before `copied` auto-resets; `0` disables auto-reset |
| `write` | Clipboard API | `(text) => Promise`; default uses `navigator.clipboard.writeText` |
| `onCopy` | -- | `(text) => void` after a successful copy |
| `onError` | -- | `(err) => void` if the write throws |

## API

```ts
{
    value(): string
    isCopied(): boolean
    isError(): boolean
    setValue(v: string): void
    copy(): Promise<boolean>
    reset(): void

    attachRoot(el): off
    attachTrigger(el): off
    attachIndicator(el): off

    destroy(): void
}
```

## Painted attributes

- `data-clipboard-root` / `data-clipboard-trigger` / `data-clipboard-indicator` -- slot markers
- `data-copied` -- boolean, present during the copied window
- `data-error` -- boolean, present if the last copy threw
- trigger `type="button"` -- only if the trigger is a `<button>`
- trigger `aria-label` -- "Copy" / "Copied", only if not pre-set
- indicator `aria-live="polite"` -- so the copied text is announced

## Wrapper (`<lite-clipboard>`)

```html
<lite-clipboard value="npm i @zakkster/lite-headless" timeout="2000">
  <button data-trigger>Copy</button>
  <span data-indicator>Copied!</span>
</lite-clipboard>
```

Reactive: the `value` attribute flows through bidirectionally.
Host: `copy()`, `reset()`, `setValue(v)`, `value`, `copied`.
